fields.title: extension: discover skills + build lookup index
fields.description:
Implement skill discovery inside the extension using pi APIs (import from @mariozechner/pi-coding-agent):
- loadSettings(cwd, agentDir) to respect existing skills settings
- discoverSkills(cwd, agentDir, settings.skills) to get names/descriptions/paths
- Build in-memory index: name -> { path, description }
- Cache SKILL.md contents on first use (strip frontmatter for injected body if we choose)

Code anchors (pi-mono reference):
- skills discovery logic: packages/coding-agent/src/core/skills.ts
- sdk helpers: packages/coding-agent/src/core/sdk.ts (discoverSkills, loadSettings)

DoD:
- Given a known local skill, extension can resolve name -> SKILL.md path reliably.
- Handles missing/disabled/invalid skills gracefully (notify or ignore per spec).
- No filesystem scanning on every keystroke (cache or debounce).
fields.close_reason: Implemented skill discovery + in-memory index and cached body loader
